rule_metadata.name: MTI_Hunting_INDUSTROYERv2_Bytes
rule_metadata.author: Mandiant
rule_metadata.description: Searching for executables containing bytecode associated with the INDUSTROYER.V2 malware family.

rules.rule_text:
rule MTI_Hunting_INDUSTROYERv2_Bytes
{
	meta:
		author = "Mandiant"
		date = "04-09-2022"
		description = "Searching for executables containing bytecode associated with the INDUSTROYER.V2 malware family."
		reference = "https://www.mandiant.com/resources/industroyer-v2-old-malware-new-tricks"

	strings:
		$bytes = {8B [2] 89 [2] 8B 0D [4] 89 [2] 8B 15 [4] 89 [2] A1 [4] 89 [2] 8B 0D [4] 89 [2] 8A 15 [4] 88 [2] 8D [2] 5? 8B [2] E8}

	condition:
		filesize < 3MB and uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and uint32( uint32( 0x3C ) ) == 0x00004550 and $bytes
}
